fact.fact: Over 96,000 existing rooftop solar users are under the Malaysian Building Integrated Photovoltaic (MBIPV) and Net Energy Metering (NEM) schemes in Malaysia as of 2025.
fact.source_text: Govt maintains credit scheme for over 96,000 rooftop solar users
fact.source_document: Renewable Energy Act 2011 and FiT LSS programme overview

verdict.reason: The source text directly states the number of rooftop solar users and the schemes they are under.

fact.fact: The government of Malaysia will continue to allow over 96,000 existing rooftop solar users under the Malaysian Building Integrated Photovoltaic (MBIPV) and Net Energy Metering (NEM) schemes to earn electricity bill credits as of 2025.
fact.source_text: Govt maintains credit scheme for over 96,000 rooftop solar users PUTRAJAYA: The government will continue to allow over 96,000 existing rooftop solar users under the Malaysian Building Integrated Photovoltaic (MBIPV) and Net Energy Metering (NEM) schemes to earn electricity bill
fact.source_document: Renewable Energy Act 2011 and FiT LSS programme overview

verdict.reason: The source text directly and unambiguously states the fact.

fact.fact: The Ministry of Energy Transition and Water Transformation (PETRA) has allocated RM70 million for the Program Nikmat Untuk Rakyat PETRA (NUR@PETRA) in 2025.
fact.source_text: Program NUR@PETRA tawar e-rebat RM70 juta untuk pembelian peralatan elektrik cekap tenaga
fact.source_document: Renewable Energy Act 2011 and FiT LSS programme overview

verdict.reason: The source text directly states the allocation of RM70 million for the NUR@PETRA program.

fact.fact: The Sustainable Energy Development Authority (SEDA) Malaysia has appointed Public Service Department Director-General Tan Sri Wan Ahmad Dahlan Abdul Aziz as chairman effective May 15, 2025.
fact.source_text: SEDA appoints public service department DG as chairman KUALA LUMPUR: The Sustainable Energy Development Authority (SEDA) Malaysia has appointed Public Service Department Director-General Tan Sri Wan Ahmad Dahlan Abdul Aziz as chairman effective May 15.
fact.source_document: Renewable Energy Act 2011 and FiT LSS programme overview

verdict.reason: The source text does not mention the year of appointment, which is included in the candidate fact.

synthesis.content: Malaysia has over 96,000 existing rooftop solar users under the Malaysian Building Integrated Photovoltaic (MBIPV) and Net Energy Metering (NEM) schemes, who will continue to earn electricity bill credits. The government has allocated funds for initiatives like the Program Nikmat Untuk Rakyat PETRA (NUR@PETRA). However, the relationship between the allocated funds and the rooftop solar users is not explicitly stated.

The government has allocated funds for initiatives like the Program Nikmat Untuk Rakyat PETRA (NUR@PETRA).
However, the relationship between the allocated funds and the rooftop solar users is not explicitly stated.

The government has allocated funds for initiatives such as the Program Nikmat Untuk Rakyat PETRA (NUR@PETRA).

Malaysia has over 96,000 existing rooftop solar users under the Malaysian Building Integrated Photovoltaic and Net Energy Metering schemes, who can earn electricity bill credits. The government will continue to support these users. The Ministry of Energy Transition and Water Transformation has allocated RM70 million for the Program Nikmat Untuk Rakyat PETRA.
